summary: Completed testing of P0 features: Footer legal links, legal pages content (KVKK), home stats API, home CTA API, and contact map URL. All backend tests passed (8/8). All frontend tests passed. Fixed missing routes for legal pages.
passed_tests: Backend - GET /api/content/home-stats returns correct structure with stats array
Backend - PUT /api/content/home-stats updates stats successfully with auth
Backend - GET /api/content/home-cta returns correct structure (title, description, button_text, button_link)
Backend - PUT /api/content/home-cta updates CTA successfully with auth
Frontend - /gizlilik-politikasi page loads with KVKK content
Frontend - /kullanim-kosullari page loads with legal content
Frontend - Homepage stats section displays 4 dynamic stats (15+, 200+, 500+, %98)
Frontend - Homepage CTA section displays dynamic title and button
Frontend - Admin Panel İstatistikler tab visible and functional
Frontend - Admin Panel CTA tab visible and functional
Frontend - Admin Panel İletişim tab has Google Maps Embed section
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features tested: 1) Footer links for Gizlilik Politikası and Kullanım Koşulları - working, routes added in App.js, 2) Legal pages have professional KVKK content, 3) GET/PUT /api/content/home-stats and /api/content/home-cta endpoints working, 4) Admin panel İçerik Yönetimi has İstatistikler and CTA tabs, 5) Contact page map_embed_url field working. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_p0_features.py

fix_applied.issue: Routes for /gizlilik-politikasi and /kullanim-kosullari were missing in App.js despite components being imported
fix_applied.solution: Added Route elements for both legal pages in App.js

feature_verification.kullanim_kosullari_page: ✓ Working - Contains legal content (Hizmet Kapsamı, etc.)
feature_verification.home_stats_api_get: ✓ Working - Returns stats array with icon, value, label
feature_verification.home_cta_api_get: ✓ Working - Returns title, description, button_text, button_link
feature_verification.home_stats_frontend: ✓ Working - 4 stats displayed dynamically from API
feature_verification.home_cta_frontend: ✓ Working - CTA section displays dynamic content
feature_verification.admin_stats_tab: ✓ Working - İstatistikler tab in İçerik Yönetimi
feature_verification.admin_cta_tab: ✓ Working - CTA tab in İçerik Yönetimi
feature_verification.admin_contact_map: ✓ Working - Google Maps Embed URL field in İletişim tab
